short: Choosing, filtering, cleaning, and balancing training data to raise its quality.
definition: Data curation is the work of choosing, filtering, cleaning, and balancing training data to raise its quality. It includes removing low-quality, duplicated, toxic, or private content and balancing domains and languages. Careful curation — not just adding raw volume — is now seen as one of the most powerful levers for improving a model's performance and safety.
